fields.name: Bank Account No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the bank account number. If you select Balance at Date, the balance as of the last day in the relevant time interval is displayed.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Check No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number on the check.

fields.name: Currency Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the currency code for the amount on the line.

fields.name: Document Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of the document on the line.

fields.name: Document Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the related document was created.

fields.name: Payee
fields.tooltip: Specifies the recipient of the payment.

fields.name: User ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the user who posted the entry, to be used, for example, in the change log.

fields.name: Update Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies when the Positive Pay export was updated.
